tasks.description: Use the project repository https://github.com/beautyarbutin/handoff-fixture-inventory.git on branch handoff-exp/D_no_risks/run01, not main. Read the TASK-001 handoff supplied through the D_no_risks experiment path and inspect the relevant inventory modules and tests before editing.
tasks.expected_output: Project repository is on branch handoff-exp/D_no_risks/run01 with the successor requirements understood from the handoff and local code context.

tasks.description: Implement src/inventory/api.py::search_items(query, items=None) according to the handoff and repository conventions. The API should support the required inventory search query parameters, validate API inputs where needed, and return client-facing plain dictionary results.
tasks.expected_output: src/inventory/api.py exposes a working search_items implementation compatible with the existing inventory domain model and filtering behavior.

tasks.description: Run python -m pytest tests evaluation_tests in the project repository. If failures appear, make focused fixes within the TASK-002 scope and rerun the same command until the required suite passes or a concrete blocker is recorded.
tasks.expected_output: Required pytest command result is captured, with passing tests or a specific blocker and failure details.

tasks.description: Commit and push project code changes to handoff-exp/D_no_risks/run01 in the project repository. Write TASK-002 result.json and usage.json under outputs/handoff-exp/D_no_risks/run01 in the HALF collaboration repository, then commit and push those collaboration artifacts.
tasks.expected_output: Project branch is pushed with the implementation, and HALF contains the TASK-002 result and usage artifacts for polling.
